steps.t: The cache of healing draughts is hidden well to the south of Lhanuch, on the border of the Lich Bluffs. The Rangers' rune may be found atop a green hi…
The cache of potions would be buried around the base of a boulder some forty paces west into a stand of evergreens. Culang asked you to retrieve a hid…
Culang is at his camp in Nan Laeglin, north-east of the cache. You have discovered the Rangers' cache and dug up the healing draughts hidden there. No…
